title: Glasfabrik
summary: Glasfabrik is a cultural production space and event venue in Leipzig. I joined as event manager in June 2026, working across programming, coordination, and on-site delivery.

title: Detect Classic Festival
summary: A festival blending classical, electronic, and experimental music. I lead the Kidz Space area, coordinating planning, setup, and on-site delivery with the wider festival team.

title: Chaos Computer Congress (38C3)
summary: Production lead for Hackers Beauty Palace, a self-organised space within Europe's largest hacker conference (~12,000 participants). Responsible for full event management, coordination, and on-site delivery.
